changes: Significantly increased the accuracy of whisper trim so it more accurately recognizes the true boundaries of each word, and will no longer accidentally cut off part of a word belonging to the dialogue
Fixed an issue causing the TTS generation to get stuck for some users when using the batch generation feature for OmniVoice

Improved the accuracy of batch generation, and added a self correcting mechanism to automatically regenerate lines individually if they were part of a batch attempt that had mangled TTS speech (can rarely happen on some problematic lines)
Improved the accuracy of the Cutoff Guard feature to reduce the instances of it accidentally leaving in the throwaway word, which would sometimes happen
Fixed the search function's performance issues. It's now responsive again, and will not freeze the app while searching on sessions which have a large number of lines
Additional under the hood improvements and minor bug fixes

Improved duplicate-line detection so it now catches duplicates across all mods and combines them into one line (rather than just combining duplicate lines from the same mod). This simplifies the creation process, and saves on TTS generation time
Fixed a multi-second freeze that happened every time you edited a line or variation
Fixed the list scrolling back to the top when adding or removing variations
Added a "Show Errors" option to the Filter Results dropdown to quickly find lines with errors
Fixed UI glitch where the TTS API status widget was constantly resizing during certain batch operations (e.g. FUZ packing)
Set the new OmniVoice batch generation feature to skip over lines with custom TTS when creating the batch payload, then returning and re-generating them individually right after
Implemented a new feature ("Batch Generation") which **significantly** increases OmniVoice TTS generation speed by around x5-10!
You can find it under the "Phase 1" card custom TTS settings (it's off by default)
Added the ability to configure and create a FOMOD installer when creating the final mod archive (with full compatibility for BSA archiving as well)
Added an additional 500 and 1000 options to the "Items per page" dropdown menu, allowing you to see more lines per page, and also made the choice persistent between app sessions
Added the ability to interrupt a batch playback process by clicking the individual playback button next to a specific line

Fixed an issue where a batch LIP generation job would sometimes error out due to file lock conflicts when using multiple CPU cores for faster parallel generation (the more CPU cores used the more likely this could have happened)
Fixed a bug where adding variations to a line that's inside a group made the variations not appear
Added an ETA countdown timer for when generating batch TTS audio
Added batch controls to Play, Trim, Regen multiple selected lines in the table
Introducing dialogue templates: allow you to create reusable templates from various dialogue sources which are saved inside the app, reducing the dependence on external dialogue sources
Ability to Export/Import dialogue templates, sharing them with others (including custom edits, TTS settings etc.)

Added a dialogue search wizard: allows you to simply select a folder, and it will automatically find all .esp/.esm plugins containing dialogue lines, allowing you to import some or all of them at once
Ability to easily create a template from any existing session
Improved the app's ability to work with hundreds of plugins inside a single session
Added a second warning confirmation before removing a dialogue source which already has TTS generated for it
Various UI changes and improvements
Various under the hood improvements and bug fixes

Fixed parallel CPU execution for LIP/FUZ generation: the app will now correctly use all the CPU cores set under the settings/general section when generating LIP/FUZ files, significantly increasing generation speed.

Fixed a session data corruption bug which would result in project data loss if the app was closed unexpectedly mid operation. This is an important "under the hood" update and it's recommended to get it as soon as possible.
Moved the "Custom TTS Settings" option to the "Phase 1: TTS Gen" card
Added an optional "Cutoff Guard" feature to mitigate an issue with OmniVoice sometimes cutting off part of the last word in the generated audio (utilizing Faster-Whisper)
Added the ability to create custom Groups for voice lines and implemented a tabbed layout for them when present (any batch actions are now scoped per the active group)
Added a right-click context menu for easy management of groups and other batch actions (works for both single and multi-line selections)

Fixed a bug where applying custom TTS settings for a hard replaced line would incorrectly change its color to teal (which indicates user custom line edits). Instead it correctly keeps its green color, indicating a hard replaced line
Fixed a bug where a Trim on a single line would also automatically apply to other lines if they were previously manually regenerated.
Standardized support for both TTS and Lip-Sync generation for the following non-English languages: Japanese, Korean, French, German, Italian, Spanish, Chinese, and Russian.
Added lip-sync generation support for Chinese and Japanese
If you have Whisper Trim already setup, you will need to re-install it after this update
Added support for non-English languages (including Chinese, Japanese etc.)
Added trim ability using faster-whisper (AI based)
Improved ElevenLabs integration
Improved UI icons across the app
Improved the table structure and design
Various bug fixes
Fixed a bug that prevented OmniVoice server from starting for the first time
Added timeout, retry, and recovery logic to prevent a batch TTS generation process from getting stuck if the server did not return an output for a particular line
Improved installer workflow when updating from an existing version
Fixed the app title bar displaying incorrect app version
Updated the installer to detect an existing setup and update it in-place whilst preserving existing settings/sessions
Added an in-app "Check for Updates" feature that notifies you of new versions on Nexus with a changelog and one-click download link.
Fixed TTS lines occasionally getting permanently stuck at "processing" after an error.
Fixed Regen sometimes queuing a line without ever processing it during an active batch run.
Fixed an issue with parsing restricted ElevenLabs API keys which previously resulted in a generic error
Added the ability to import dialogue lines directly from .esm/.esp plugin files, retiring the need for using SSEEdit (still supported as a legacy option)
Initial changelog-tracked release.
